titleStmt.title: SII 9.218: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 218. (A.R. No. 516 of 1915.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR A BRIDGE AT CHINNATUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and the date is not fully preserved. The preserved portion reads Chālukya-Vikrama year • • Mārggasira, puṇṇame, Ādivāra, lunar eclipse. One of the following three may be the dates intended:—(1) A.D. 1080 November 29, Sunday; (2) A.D. 1100 November 18, Sunday; or (3) A.D. 1127 November 20, Sunday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Siṅgarasa who was ruling over Sindavāḍi one thousand made some gift to the god Sōmēśvaradēva. Mentions Anantaśakti-Paṇḍitadēva. Since it is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama era the record may be assigned to the reign of Vikramāditya VI.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja para
mēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvaru vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravardhdhamā
namācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa svasti sa
madhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāma(ṁ)ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīramahēśvaraṁ cōḷakaṭakakarituraga
bhaṭa nicayanicitabaḷavadaribaḷatimirakhaṇḍanapratāpamārttaṇḍaṁ nikarakoḷga
maṇḍaḷikaśiraḥkhaṇḍanaṁ maṇḍaḷikamukhamaṇḍananadaṭama(ṁ)ṇḍaḷikatārakā
murāri mitrama(ṁ)ṇḍaḷikakuḷārṇnavacaṁdra bhōgāmarēṁdraṁ satyavikhyātaṁ
taśāhavaniṟa neyaṁkakāṟaṁ pallikōṭāgharaṭṭaṁ gūrjjaradi
bhuvanamalladēvara kaṭṭidalagu malavaranalagu nāmādisama
nmahāma(ṁ)ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ siṁgarasaru siṁdavāḍi sāsirumanāḷdē
tuṁbuḷa nelevīḍinoḷu cāḷukyavikramasaṁvatsarada
vatsarada mārggasira puṇname Ādivāra sōmagrahaṇaṁ
śrīsvayaṁbhudakṣiṇasōmēśvaradēvargge mērakhaṁḍayadēva
niraṁjanapaṁḍitara sisyaranaṁtaśaktipaṁḍitadēva
yamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇajapasamā
tarkasāstrapārāThe inscription is mutilated after this.
Digital edition of SII 9.218 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
